user.title: Select Server
user.description: Due to rate limiting on the official server, please choose which API instance to use. Using a self-hosted instance is recommended for the best experience.

data.server_url: Server URL/IP (e.g. http://192.168.1.50:8092 or Home Assistant Add-on URL http://127.0.0.1:8092)

station_search.title: Find your Station
station_search.description:
Please enter the name of your station (e.g. 'Berlin Hbf') and select the matching provider.

**Tip**: For train stations (Deutsche Bahn, RE, S-Bahn), the default provider is usually correct. Only select a different provider if you are looking for local public transport (bus, tram, subway).

choose.title: Select Station
choose.description:
Please select the correct station from the list below.

**Station not found?** If your station isn't listed, you can select 'Manual Entry' to configure it manually.

details.title: Configure Departure Board
details.description: Configure options for **{station}**. If you need to fine-tune filters or advanced handling, please enable **Show Advanced Options**.

data.next_departures: Number of Upcoming Departures to show
data.advanced: Show Advanced Options (Filter Settings / Special Handling)

advanced.title: Advanced Configuration
advanced.description:
Here you can fine-tune the sensor for **{station}**.

**Deduplication**: Use this to filter out redundant entries for the same physical train (common with local transport like KVV). It compares departures within a 2-minute window based on the 'Key' below.

data.drop_late_trains: Remove trains that are already gone
data.past_60_minutes: Include departures from the last 60 minutes
data.keep_endstation: Keep departure even if this is the end station
data.via_stations_logic: Via Station Search Logic (AND = all must match, OR = at least one)
data.favorite_trains: Multiple Favorite Trains (comma separated e.g. 'ICE 1, RE 2')
data.deduplicate_key: Custom Deduplication Key (e.g. {line} - Leave empty for default: {journeyID}{journeyId}{id}{key}{trainNumber})

manual_config.title: Configure Custom Station
manual_config.description:
Setting up **{station}**.

⚠️ **Important**: Since this station was not found automatically with the selected provider, you **must verify the Data Source** below. For example, select 'MVV' for Munich local transport or 'VRN' for Rhein-Neckar.

error.max_sensors_reached: Maximum number of departure boards reached (30).
error.no_stations_found: No matching stations found. You can try a different search term or use Manual Entry.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
error.station_not_found_warning: ⚠️ Station not found! Please verify spelling or try a different data source.
error.station_invalid: ❌ Could not retrieve data for this station. {error_detail}
error.station_ambiguous: ⚠️ The station name is ambiguous. Please be more specific or check the selected Data Source.
error.station_validation_failed: Station validation failed. Please check your settings and try again.

abort.station_validation_failed: Could not validate the station. No departure data could be retrieved. Please check the station name and data source.

general_options.title: General Settings
general_options.description: Configure basic update and query settings.

server_options.title: Server Settings
server_options.description: Configure the API server to use for this station.

filter_options.title: Filter Settings
filter_options.description: Filter departures by direction, platform, or train type.

data.favorite_trains: Multiple Favorite Trains (comma separated e.g. 'ICE 1, RE 2')

display_options.title: Display Settings
display_options.description: Configure how the data is displayed.

advanced_options.title: Advanced Settings
advanced_options.description:
Advanced configuration for API and data handling.

**Deduplication**: Filters out redundant entries for the same physical train using the 'Key' below as a unique identifier. Entries within 2 minutes of each other with the same key are merged.

data.deduplicate_key: Custom Deduplication Key (e.g. {line} - Leave empty for default: {journeyID}{journeyId}{id}{key}{trainNumber})

init.title: Stale Data for {station}
init.description:
The departure data for **{station}** has not been updated for **{hours} hours**.

This could be caused by:
- Temporary API issues
- The station may no longer be supported by the backend
- Network connectivity problems

What would you like to do?

init.title: API Error for {station}
init.description:
Multiple errors occurred while fetching data for **{station}**:

`{error}`

This might be a temporary issue. You can try again or change the data source.

change_source.title: Change Data Source
change_source.description: Select a different data source for this station.

station_unsupported.title: Station may no longer be supported

init.title: Station Possibly Unsupported
init.description:
The station **{station}** (using **{data_source}**) has failed to return data multiple times.

This station may no longer be supported by the backend. You can:
- Try again to check if it's a temporary issue
- Change to a different data source
- Remove this station from your configuration

[Report an issue on GitHub]({docs_url})

change_source.title: Change Data Source
change_source.description: Select a different data source for this station.

connection_error.title: Connection error
connection_error.description: Could not connect to the departure API for **{station}**. This issue will resolve automatically when the connection is restored.

watch_train.name: Watch Train
watch_train.description: Registers a background task to monitor a specific train departure from a station.

train_id.name: Train ID
train_id.description: The train number to watch (e.g., 'ICE 123'). Must match exactly what is shown in the sensor.

notify_service.name: Notify Service
notify_service.description: The notification service to call (e.g. 'notify.mobile_app_my_phone'). Include the domain 'notify.' prefix.

delay_threshold.name: Delay Threshold
delay_threshold.description: Minimum delay in minutes to trigger a notification (Default: 5).

notify_on_platform_change.name: Notify on Platform Change
notify_on_platform_change.description: Whether to notify if the platform changes.

notify_on_cancellation.name: Notify on Cancellation
notify_on_cancellation.description: Whether to notify if the train is cancelled.

track_connection.name: Track Connection
track_connection.description: Monitors a connecting train at a transfer station.

my_train_id.name: Current Train ID
my_train_id.description: The ID or Number of your current train (e.g. 'ICE 123').

change_station.name: Change Station
change_station.description: The station where you change trains.

next_train_id.name: Next Train ID
next_train_id.description: The ID or Number of the train you want to catch (e.g. 'ICE 456').

refresh_departures.name: Refresh Departures
refresh_departures.description: Triggers a manual refresh of train departures for all configured stations.

set_offset.name: Set Offset
set_offset.description: Dynamically overrides the default time offset for departures temporarily.

offset.name: Offset
offset.description: The new time offset in format HH:MM (e.g. 00:05).

station.name: Station
station.description: The station name to apply the offset to. If left blank, it applies to all stations.

set_paused.name: Set Paused State
set_paused.description: Enables or disables periodic data fetching for a specific station or all stations.

paused.name: Paused
paused.description: Whether to pause periodic updates (True = stop fetching, False = resume fetching).

station.name: Station
station.description: The station name to apply the paused state to. If left blank, it applies to all stations.

options.official: Official Public Server (Rate limitations - NOT recommended) - dbf.finalrewind.org
options.faserf: FaserF Public Server (Please prefer your own) - dbf.fabiseitz.de
